hero.subtitleZh: 为全球包装行业提供高品质BOPP薄膜解决方案
hero.descEn: We specialize in the production and export of BOPP films, widely used in food packaging, printing, electronics, tobacco and many other industries.
hero.descZh: 我们专注于BOPP薄膜的生产和出口，产品广泛应用于食品包装、印刷、电子、烟草等多个行业。

about.contentEn:
AEC Group was established in 2014, focusing on the production and export of packaging films.

Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility is equipped with advanced production lines and quality control systems. We specialize in producing a wide range of packaging films including gloss, matte, metalized, heat sealable, and white opaque films.

Today, we serve over 500 clients across 50 countries, providing them with high-quality packaging film solutions for various applications including food packaging, printing, electronics, and more.
about.contentZh:
AEC集团成立于2014年，专注于BOPP薄膜的生产和出口。

我们拥有先进的生产设备和质量控制体系，专业生产各种BOPP薄膜，包括光膜、哑膜、镀铝膜、热封膜等。

如今，我们为50多个国家的500多家客户提供服务，为他们提供优质的包装薄膜解决方案。
